BMGT620 Business Communication (2 Credits) Develop the ability to communicate with and about data. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business. Credit Only Granted for: BUSI758A or BMGT620.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

BMGT730 Valuation in Corporate Finance (2 Credits) An advanced topics course in Corporate Finance dealing with valuation. Main topics will be, building pro forma statements, cost of capital, using ratios and comparables to value projects and ﬁrms, dicounted cash flow valuations, WACC and APV methods of valuation and Real Option Valuations. Prerequisite: BMGT600. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business. Credit Only Granted for: BUFN630, BUFN714, BUFN750, BUFN753, or BMGT730.
